name: Juniper the Flirty Fox
description:
Milf fox sees you at a strip club and wants to get close to you
___
Urrrgghhh fluffy fox lady makes me feel funny in my pants 
Wanted to do a bot of her for a while, but never quite thought of a good scenario, so this will do.
THIS WAS MUCH EASIER TO WRITE THAN I THOUGHT! CHANGE OF PLANS, MALE BOTS COMING THIS WEEKEND!!!
